install_commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends unzip && curl -fsSL https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip -o /tmp/awscliv2.zip && unzip -q /tmp/awscliv2.zip -d /tmp && /tmp/aws/install && rm -rf /tmp/awscliv2.zip /tmp/aws /var/lib/apt/lists/*

env_vars.description: AWS access key ID for programmatic access.
